title: SonicWall Geo-IP Block and Country-Deny Audit (SonicWall)
dataSources: `sourcetype=dell:sonicwall:firewall` geo fields (`src_country`, `dst_country`) or extracted from vendor message
spl:
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(fw_action),"(?i)block|deny|drop") AND (isnotnull(src_country) OR match(_raw,"(?i)geo"))
| stats count by src_country, dst_country, rule
| sort -count
description: Geo-blocking stops opportunistic scans and complies with data-residency policies. Auditing denies proves the control is active and highlights mis-tuned categories.
value: Demonstrates enforcement to regulators and helps tune exceptions before business traffic is impacted.
implementation: Confirm Geo-IP filtering is enabled and logged with country fields. Normalize ISO country codes; enrich with a risk lookup for embargoed regions.
visualization: Choropleth or bar chart (top blocked countries), timechart (geo deny rate).

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Geo-blocking stops opportunistic scans and complies with data-residency policies — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
